The ServiceLifecycle Project
===========================

This vendored UnixSignals subset is derived from the Swift Service Lifecycle
project:

* https://github.com/swift-server/swift-service-lifecycle

Copyright 2019-2023 The ServiceLifecycle Project

The ServiceLifecycle Project licenses its files under the Apache License,
version 2.0. See LICENSE.txt in this directory.

This license restoration recorded upstream revision
2fd7a348e9d0333979108c2da83642a64df6cb2c.

This product contains derivations of Lock and LockedValueBox implementations
from SwiftNIO and uses swift-async-algorithms in upstream form. Both upstream
projects are distributed under the Apache License, version 2.0.
